name: write-code-by-hand
description: Locked natural-language editor skills for human-authored code changes and enterprise-grade cursor governance.

interface.shortDescription: Human-authored code with AI-mediated cursor governance
interface.longDescription: Use Write Code By Hand to constrain an AI coding agent into locked editor containment: it can inspect files, move a cursor, and apply exact human-authored edits, but it cannot invent code, answer engineering questions, or escape into helpfulness.
defaultPrompt: Use write-code-by-hand to edit this repository by hand.
Enter editor containment and wait for exact edits.
